title: Better Impaling Forge
description: A simple mod to change the way impaling enchantment works.
body:
This mod changes the way impaling ehchantment works: impaling enchantment now affects any mob in water or rain to synchronize with bedrock edition.

For example, attacking a normal creeper in rain with a trident with impaling V, will kill the creeper immediately.

Better Impaling's unofficial Forge edition.

NO MORE made with MCreator. (Since v2.0)

Have fun with your trident!
